schema.last_reviewed: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when an editor last reviewed the page
schema.cadence: expected review interval: daily | weekly | biweekly | monthly | editorial
schema.notes: optional one-line context shown next to the stamp

policy: Editor bumps last_reviewed when the page gets a real review or content update. Pages with cadence other than 'editorial' get a Next-Review-Due stamp computed from last_reviewed + cadence interval, and surface an OVERDUE flag when today is past that date.

/ai-infrastructure.notes: New projects added when announced; updates when status (announced/permitted/construction/operational) changes.

/timeline.notes: Historical record of AI ecosystem milestones. Monthly review for new entries.
